title: Muhammara Stuffed Red Peppers
description: A flavorful twist on traditional stuffed peppers, featuring muhammara as the filling.

ingredients.name: Red Peppers
ingredients.notes: any color pepper will work, but red adds extra sweetness

instructions: Cut off the tops of the peppers and remove seeds and membranes.
Place peppers in a baking dish and brush with olive oil.
Fill each pepper with a portion of muhammara, followed by a scoop of cooked rice.
Top with chopped parsley, if using.
Cover baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until peppers are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
